role: MobileTray is the mobile selection-action component that renders a bottom tray of pointed items and exposes verbs (explain, ask, change, clear) against the current selection.
capabilities: Render pointed-set items as removable chips
Fetch and display per-address explanations from /api/address-help
Dispatch a builder-context custom event and switch to the builder tab
Accept change input and mint a build intent via AppContext
substance_why: It implements real UI, API calls, event dispatch, and state management for selection verbs rather than stubbing them.
interactions_present: Tap chip to remove an item from the pointed set
Toggle explain panel and fetch descriptions
Ask button sends builder-context event and calls setMobileTab('builder')
Toggle change input, type intent, press Enter or tap button to mint
Clear button empties the pointed set
interactions_missing: Long-press gesture is not implemented here despite the design comment
No handling when explain is invoked on more than six items beyond silent truncation
No error/empty-state handling for ask or mint failures
No loading or success feedback for mint beyond busy text
No keyboard/accessibility handling for tray verbs
No abort/cleanup of in-flight explain fetches
performance_risks: Explain awaits up to six sequential fetches, blocking the UI and multiplying latency
No request cancellation or deduplication if the user toggles/clears during explain
No memoization of chips or explanation rows, causing re-renders on every state change
Global CustomEvent dispatch on every ask without a typed channel
reuse_why: The selection-verb concepts and data flow are worth preserving, but the UI, concurrency, and event wiring should be rebuilt for the redesign.
decomposition_hints: Split tray-chips list into a reusable PointedChips component
Split explain panel and fetch logic into an ExplainPanel with concurrent/abortable requests
Split change/mint form into a MintIntent component
Split ask dispatch into a typed hook or context action instead of a raw window event
Separate the tray shell (layout/visibility) from the verb implementations
